data.content: 1. The knot requires views to use and show aliases when present. 2. Five views still render stripped IDs instead of aliases: beat-columns.tsx, beat-detail-lightbox.tsx, dep-tree.tsx, retakes-view.tsx, and cascade-close-dialog.tsx. 3. Alias support is implemented and tested for beat-display, relationship-picker, wave-planner, and waves route, but the remaining views are not covered. 4. Review-only checks: targeted alias tests passed, bunx tsc --noEmit passed, and bun run lint exited with warnings only.
